tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, indicating prediabetes or early diabetes, but current glucose is normal. Creatinine is slightly low, which is usually not clinically significant. Chloride is mildly elevated, possibly due to mild dehydration or metabolic factors. Lipid profile is within target ranges. No acute abnormalities detected; recommend monitoring glycemic control and hydration status.
Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
